async def exportleads(update, context):
    files=sorted(Path(LEAD_DIR).glob("APH*.json"), reverse=True)
    if not files:
        return await update.message.reply_text("No leads to export.")
    export_file=Path(LEAD_DIR, "exported_leads.json")
    data=[json.loads(f.read_text()) for f in files]
    export_file.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
    await update.message.reply_text("✅ Leads exported on server:\n"+str(export_file))

app.add_handler(CommandHandler("leads", leads))
app.add_handler(CommandHandler("exportleads", exportleads))
